programs.name: Specially Designated Global Terrorist
programs.description: Designations of foreign persons who have committed, or pose a significant risk of committing, acts of terrorism threatening U.S. national security, foreign policy, or the economy.

programs.name: Specially Designated Narcotics Trafficker
programs.description: Designations of significant foreign narcotics traffickers and their organizations under the Foreign Narcotics Kingpin Designation Act and Narcotics Trafficking Sanctions Regulations.

programs.name: Iran Sanctions
programs.description: Comprehensive sanctions targeting Iran's nuclear proliferation, ballistic missile development, support for terrorism, and human rights abuses, pursuant to multiple Executive Orders and the Iranian Transactions and Sanctions Regulations.

programs.name: Russia Harmful Foreign Activities Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions related to Russia's harmful foreign activities including undermining democratic institutions, cyber-enabled activities, transnational corruption, and the conflict in Ukraine, pursuant to E.O. 14024.

programs.name: Ukraine-Related Sanctions (E.O. 13660)
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons responsible for or complicit in actions or policies that threaten the peace, security, stability, sovereignty, or territorial integrity of Ukraine.

programs.name: Ukraine-Related Sanctions (E.O. 13661)
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons operating in sectors of the Russian Federation economy including financial services, energy, metals and mining, engineering, and defense, in connection with the Ukraine crisis.

programs.name: Ukraine-Related Sanctions (E.O. 13662)
programs.description: Sectoral sanctions targeting Russia's financial services, energy, metals and mining, engineering, and defense sectors in response to Russia's actions in Ukraine.

programs.name: Sectoral Sanctions Identifications List
programs.description: Entities subject to sectoral sanctions under E.O. 13662, restricting certain transactions in the financial, energy, and defense sectors of Russia.

programs.name: North Korea Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting North Korea's weapons of mass destruction and ballistic missile programs, illicit financial activities, human rights abuses, and sanctions evasion networks.

programs.name: North Korea Sanctions (E.O. 13722)
programs.description: Additional sanctions on North Korea targeting trade in minerals, metals, transportation, and financial services that generate revenue for the DPRK regime.

programs.name: North Korea Sanctions (E.O. 13810)
programs.description: Expanded North Korea sanctions targeting persons facilitating DPRK trade, including shipping and financial networks, and blocking property of persons involved in certain industries.

programs.name: North Korea Sanctions (E.O. 13551)
programs.description: Sanctions targeting North Korean arms trafficking, luxury goods procurement, illicit financial activities, and money laundering under E.O. 13551.

programs.name: Cuba Sanctions
programs.description: Comprehensive sanctions program targeting Cuba, administered under the Cuban Assets Control Regulations (CACR), restricting trade, financial transactions, and travel.

programs.name: Syria Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting the Syrian regime and its supporters for human rights abuses, corruption, destabilizing activities, and use of chemical weapons against civilians.

programs.name: Venezuela Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting the Maduro regime in Venezuela for undermining democratic processes, human rights abuses, corruption, and restrictions on the state oil company PdVSA.

programs.name: Transnational Criminal Organizations Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting significant transnational criminal organizations and their members, facilitators, and supporters under E.O. 13581.

programs.name: Malicious Cyber-Enabled Activities Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons engaged in significant malicious cyber-enabled activities, including attacks on critical infrastructure, election interference, and ransomware operations.

programs.name: Global Magnitsky Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting perpetrators of serious human rights abuse and corruption worldwide under the Global Magnitsky Human Rights Accountability Act (E.O. 13818).

programs.name: Western Balkans Stabilization Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons contributing to the destabilization of the Western Balkans region, including obstruction of the Dayton Accords and Ohrid Framework Agreement.

programs.name: Yemen-Related Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting those threatening the peace, security, or stability of Yemen, including Houthi-affiliated actors and those obstructing the political process.

programs.name: Burma Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting the military regime in Burma (Myanmar), persons undermining democratic institutions, and those responsible for human rights abuses including the Rohingya crisis.

programs.name: Ethiopia Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions addressing the crisis in northern Ethiopia, targeting persons responsible for or complicit in actions that have contributed to the humanitarian crisis and conflict.

programs.name: Nicaragua Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting the Ortega-Murillo regime and persons responsible for undermining democratic institutions, human rights abuses, and corruption in Nicaragua.

programs.name: Hong Kong Normalization Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions in response to actions by the PRC to undermine Hong Kong's autonomy, targeting persons involved in developing, adopting, or implementing the Hong Kong National Security Law.

programs.name: Chinese Military-Industrial Complex Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions addressing the threat posed by the military-industrial complex of the People's Republic of China, restricting U.S. persons from investing in designated Chinese defense and surveillance technology companies.

programs.name: Non-SDN Chinese Military-Industrial Complex List
programs.description: Non-SDN list of Chinese military-industrial complex companies subject to investment restrictions for U.S. persons under E.O. 13959 as amended by E.O. 14032.

programs.name: Correspondent Account / Payable-Through Account Sanctions
programs.description: List of foreign financial institutions subject to correspondent or payable-through account sanctions, requiring U.S. banks to impose strict conditions or prohibitions on accounts.

programs.name: Foreign Sanctions Evaders List
programs.description: Designations of foreign persons who have violated, attempted to violate, or facilitated the evasion of U.S. sanctions against Iran and Syria.

programs.name: Non-SDN Menu-Based Sanctions List
programs.description: Non-SDN list of persons subject to menu-based sanctions under various authorities, where one or more sanctions from a defined menu may be imposed.

programs.name: Palestinian Legislative Council List
programs.description: List of members of the Palestinian Legislative Council who are not combatants but are subject to certain sanctions restrictions under E.O. 13224 as amended.

programs.name: Iranian Financial Sanctions Regulations
programs.description: Sanctions targeting Iranian financial institutions and persons facilitating financial transactions for the Government of Iran, Iranian banks, and designated persons.

programs.name: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps and its officials, agents, affiliates, and supporters for terrorism, proliferation, and human rights abuses.

programs.name: Weapons of Mass Destruction Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting proliferators of weapons of mass destruction and their delivery systems, as well as persons who support or facilitate such proliferation activities.

programs.name: Non-Proliferation of WMD Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons involved in the proliferation of weapons of mass destruction or delivery systems under E.O. 13382, aimed at preventing WMD proliferation financing.

programs.name: Iraq-Related Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions related to the stabilization of Iraq, targeting persons who threaten the peace or stability of Iraq, or the Government of Iraq, or undermine its reconstruction.

programs.name: Lebanon-Related Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons undermining the sovereignty of Lebanon or its democratic institutions and processes, including Hizballah-related designations.

programs.name: Libya Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons threatening the peace, security, or stability of Libya, including those exploiting the conflict for personal gain and obstructing the political process.

programs.name: Somalia Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons contributing to the conflict in Somalia, including Al-Shabaab and persons obstructing humanitarian aid delivery or violating the arms embargo.

programs.name: Sudan and Darfur Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons responsible for the conflict in Darfur, those threatening peace in Sudan, and persons involved in human rights abuses and arms trafficking.

programs.name: Zimbabwe Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons undermining democratic processes or institutions in Zimbabwe, engaging in human rights abuses, and facilitating corruption.

programs.name: Mali-Related Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons threatening the peace, security, or stability of Mali, including those obstructing the political process and violating human rights.

programs.name: Central African Republic Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons contributing to the conflict in the Central African Republic, including armed groups and those violating the arms embargo.

programs.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons contributing to the conflict in the eastern DRC, including armed groups, those violating the arms embargo, and persons committing human rights abuses.

programs.name: Burundi Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons contributing to the situation in Burundi, including violence against civilians and undermining democratic processes.

programs.name: South Sudan Sanctions
programs.description: Sanctions targeting persons contributing to the conflict in South Sudan, threatening the peace and stability of the country, and obstructing the peace process.
